channel.title: Torrent on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Torrent on Arrans github.io

item.title: Jackett/Jackett
item.description: API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

item.title: K3vinb5/Unyo
item.description: 🐙 Anime streaming and Manga reader desktop app without ads.

item.title: GopeedLab/gopeed
item.description: A fast, modern download manager for HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, and ed2k. Cross-platform, built with Golang and Flutter.

item.title: bitmagnet-io/bitmagnet
item.description: A self-hosted BitTorrent indexer, DHT crawler, content classifier and torrent search engine with web UI, GraphQL API and Servarr stack integration.

item.title: arran4/KMagMux
item.description: Torrent and Magent file and protocol handler for routing to programs / services
